name: repo-up
description: Start package repo stack (DB + S3 + app)

steps.command: STATE=$(docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' nextra-packagerepo 2>/dev/null); if [ "$STATE" = "true" ]; then echo '[repo] Already running'; exit 0; fi; docker rm -f nextra-packagerepo 2>/dev/null || true; docker network create nextra-packagerepo-net 2>/dev/null || true; DB_STATE=$(docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' nextra-packagerepo-db 2>/dev/null); if [ "$DB_STATE" != "true" ]; then docker rm -f nextra-packagerepo-db 2>/dev/null || true; docker volume create nextra-packagerepo-dbdata; docker run -d --name nextra-packagerepo-db --network nextra-packagerepo-net --mount type=volume,src=nextra-packagerepo-dbdata,dst=/var/lib/postgresql/data -e POSTGRES_DB=packagerepo -e POSTGRES_USER=packagerepo -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=packagerepo postgres:16-alpine; fi; S3_STATE=$(docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' nextra-s3server 2>/dev/null); if [ "$S3_STATE" != "true" ]; then echo '[repo] Starting S3 dependency...'; docker network create nextra-s3server-net 2>/dev/null || true; docker volume create nextra-s3server-data; S3DB_STATE=$(docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' nextra-s3server-db 2>/dev/null); if [ "$S3DB_STATE" != "true" ]; then docker rm -f nextra-s3server-db 2>/dev/null || true; docker volume create nextra-s3server-dbdata; docker run -d --name nextra-s3server-db --network nextra-s3server-net --mount type=volume,src=nextra-s3server-dbdata,dst=/var/lib/postgresql/data -e POSTGRES_DB=s3server -e POSTGRES_USER=s3user -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=s3pass postgres:16-alpine; fi; docker rm -f nextra-s3server 2>/dev/null || true; docker run -d --name nextra-s3server --network nextra-s3server-net -p 9000:9000 --mount type=volume,src=nextra-s3server-data,dst=/data/s3 -e 'S3_DB_CONN=host=nextra-s3server-db port=5432 dbname=s3server user=s3user password=s3pass' -e S3_DATA_DIR=/data/s3 -e S3_REGION=us-east-1 -e S3_PORT=9000 -e PGHOST=nextra-s3server-db -e PGPORT=5432 -e PGUSER=s3user -e PGPASSWORD=s3pass -e PGDATABASE=s3server nextra-s3server; fi; docker network connect nextra-packagerepo-net nextra-s3server 2>/dev/null || true; docker run -d --name nextra-packagerepo --network nextra-packagerepo-net -p 5050:5000 -e S3_ENDPOINT=http://nextra-s3server:9000 -e S3_BUCKET=packagerepo -e S3_ACCESS_KEY=minioadmin -e 'DATABASE_URL=host=nextra-packagerepo-db port=5432 dbname=packagerepo user=packagerepo password=packagerepo' -e PGHOST=nextra-packagerepo-db -e PGPORT=5432 -e PGUSER=packagerepo -e PGPASSWORD=packagerepo -e PGDATABASE=packagerepo -e JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-key nextra-packagerepo; echo '[repo] Started on port 5050'
